nostalgiaetherealcollection_file65.episode: Retro 90's Roller Rink Jams & WTC Twin Towers Mix I (2024) [Slowed And Reverb].MP4
nostalgiaetherealcollection_file65.desc:
Welcome to nostalgia central. NostalgiaEthereal's aka The Retro Connoisseur's wide collection of nostalgic content all in one place for everyone caring to go back in time for hours upon hours. VHS recordings ranging from the 90's to 00's, long marathons of obscure television, vintage cartoons and anime, retro drive-in movie projects, TV-movie broadcast recreations, original commercials throughout, Adult Swim-related content, and September 11th-related content. This is a time-machine in the form of a database. As time progresses, more will be added as I acquire more VHS tapes to transfer. So be on the lookout as time moves on for new content uploaded. Archiving these things is HIGHLY important and crucial to preservation of a time period that has long past and must be kept alive through data-hoarding archived media catalogues such as this.
I do not own any of the content shared here. Only for historical preservation and entertainment purposes.

youtube-hE7VS6t2zu4_file1.desc:
EDIT (12 Feb. 2016): 1mjusth3r3 is finally back on YouTube, after a one year hiatus! Check out his new channel, 2mjusth4r4 for more classic promos and commercials, from channels such as Disney Channel, CN, Toon Disney, etc. It's worth the nostalgia rush. ;-) https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCZfpqGXiGGzgAaTsHtIBLfw/ [NOTICE HERE IN CASE THIS GETS REUPLOADED ONTO BOT CHANNEL REUPLOADS. Please don't drop the soap - CNArchive] The complete set of CN promos & bumpers that have been previously uploaded by former YouTuber 1mjusth3r3, all in one huge compilation vid. This is literally the first time I've actually uploaded something beyond Checkerboard/Powerhouse, but I might consider City bumps at this rate, considering it's actually been 11 years since the rebrand started. Anything leading up to the "Fall" 2007 rebrand, I won't. Knowing how that was a huge point in the network where it took a turn for the worse, which was around the time Jim Samples resigned as CEO after the Aqua Teen bomb scare in Boston that very year. I'll only let it slide once, but never again. Please don't ask for more. I'll upload more on my own time, whenever I'm free. This also goes out to the same guy who keeps requesting Tex Avery bumps every single time. Oh, and if you're worried about this vid getting taken down at some point, just download it and quit whining like a little bitch over it. I strongly recommend using KeepVid for the highest possible quality you can find. http://keepvid.com/

Source: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=hE7VS6t2zu4

Upload date: 20150725

the-mind-of-gay-gangsta-comedy-against-h.show: The Mind Of Gay Gangsta: Comedy Against Humanity (Full Collection)
the-mind-of-gay-gangsta-comedy-against-h.desc:
From nothing to something; comedian Troy Lad (age 19 as of this writing) creates a legacy for himself, with his comedy masterpiece. Originally a movie, he took to a broken up format to make it easily accessible and digestible, containing 60+ hours of content. Over the course of a 3 and a half year period, Troy grew fascinated by the art of comedy and made himself a promise: he would become the greatest of all time.

EVERYTHING SAID AND DONE IN THESE VIDEOS ARE FOR ENTERTAINMENT PURPOSES ONLY!!!

youtube-7Noqp4tkVFo_file1.show: Remembering Sacco & Vanzetti: Cultural Manifestations of "The Case That Will Not Die"
youtube-7Noqp4tkVFo_file1.desc:
The Community Church of Boston: A Peace and Justice Congregation Since 1920
www.communitychurchofboston.org

On Wednesday August 23, we observe the 96th anniversary of the execution of Nicola Sacco and Bartolomeo Vanzetti. We do this every year in honor of the late Robert D’Attilio, who lived and breathed the memory of this good shoemaker and this good fish peddler, left us a rich repository of case materials, and reminded us of CCB’s deep historic involvement with the Sacco and Vanzetti struggle, dating back to our inception in 1920.

This year we welcome a new friend and artist of note, Shoshanah Dubiner. She has enjoyed a long and fruitful career as an artist fascinated with science and the rapturous beauty of the natural microscopic world translated onto a surreal canvas. Check out just a little sample of Shoshanah’s work right here. What brings her to us now, is a look back at artwork she did on the film set of the Giuliano Montaldo film, "Sacco and Vanzetti". Her main job was assistant costume designer, but she also produced drawings of various on-location scenes. These remarkable pieces will be on display at the Lothrop Auditorium. Join us for a 5:30 reception, followed by a 7 PM screening of the film. Join us!!

Michele Fazio is Professor of English and Co-coordinator of the Gender Studies Minor at the University of North Carolina at Pembroke where she teaches courses on contemporary U.S. ethnic literature, service-learning, and working-class studies. Her film, Voices of the Lumbee, received the Studs Terkel Award for Media and Journalism and the North Carolina Folklore Society Brown-Hudson Award. She has served as president of the Working-Class Studies Association and co-edited the Routledge International Handbook of Working-Class Studies (2021). Her research on family history, community, and memory has been exhibited at the Harvard Law School Library and the American Labor Museum. Through the support of a BMI Woody Guthrie Research Fellowship and a Massachusetts Historical Society Fellowship, she is currently working on a book project exploring the cultural legacy of Sacco and Vanzetti. She is also a founding member of the Teaching Woody Guthrie Collective.
